title: Powdered snow borders
description: Adds a border outline to powdered snow
body:
## My PvP packs all already have this, so you dont need this if you have those

### If your gonna showcase/distrubute any of my packs anywhere e.g youtube, discord then you must use the modrinth link

This texture pack adds a clear, subtle outline to powdered snow blocks, making them easier to distinguish from regular snow. Perfect for survival and PvP players who want to avoid unexpected falls while keeping the game’s natural look. The outline blends smoothly with vanilla textures, ensuring better visibility without breaking immersion.

## [Check out my other packs here!](https://modrinth.com/user/JJ_00_EPICS)

![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f07ebaa53a5d16c85c20a7438755e6e6a5bab33a.png)
